battery-threshold.tooltip: The applet will trigger the countdown dialog when battery drops to or below this percentage.

action.description: Action to take when threshold is reached
action.tooltip: The power action that will be forced after the countdown completes.

countdown-duration.tooltip: How long the countdown dialog will show before the action is forced.

test-mode.description: Test mode (no action will be taken)
test-mode.tooltip: When enabled, the countdown dialog will show and count down normally, but the power action will be skipped.

sound-file.tooltip: Select a sound to play on loop. Leave empty for the system default.

sound-loop-interval.tooltip: How often the alert sound repeats in milliseconds. Adjust this to match the length of your sound file.
